name: Azazel — The Scapegoat
description: Circle 9 Final Boss (Treachery). The original scapegoat, frozen at the center of Hell, betrayer of all.

textToImageTask.prompt: A colossal bipedal humanoid goat demon god in A-pose, the ultimate final boss, impossibly massive frame half-encased in ancient cracking blue ice that it is breaking free from, the exposed half reveals midnight black fur over god-like musculature, a crown of twelve enormous horns arranged like a dark halo each tipped with a frozen blue flame, wielding a colossal two-handed sword of black ice with a blade that shifts between solid and crystalline, chains of frozen souls wrapped around the torso as trophies, three pairs of tattered frozen wings emerging from the back like a fallen angel, digitigrade goat legs encased in ancient ice armor cracking with every movement, three eyes in a triangular pattern on the forehead all burning cold blue above the two normal ice-white eyes, 4 meters tall, stylized dark fantasy game final boss character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Colossal goat demon god breaking from ice, twelve horns in dark halo with frozen flames, black ice greatsword, frozen soul chains, six tattered ice wings, three forehead eyes, 4m, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Midnight black divine fur, cracking ancient blue ice encasement, frozen blue flame horn tips, crystalline shifting black ice sword blade, frozen soul chain trophies, tattered ice-crystal wings, cold burning blue triangular forehead eyes
